name: interview_agent_project
description: AI Interview Agent Project Structure client/: React Frontend (Partner's work) server/: Node.js Backend (API & DB) agent/: Python LangGraph Agent (The Brain)

scripts.check:backend: node --check BACKEND/server.js && node --check BACKEND/controllers/authController.js && node --check BACKEND/controllers/interviewcontroller.js && node --check BACKEND/routes/authroutes.js && node --check BACKEND/routes/interviewroutes.js && node --check BACKEND/services/agentservice.js && node --check BACKEND/middleware/auth.js && node --check BACKEND/config/db.js
scripts.check:agent: python -m py_compile AGENT/main.py AGENT/graph.py AGENT/utils.py AGENT/python_agent.py AGENT/check_models.py
scripts.check:all: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend && npm run check:agent
